notes: Fixes Bridge-to-EA delivery for provider formats that Bridge parses but the EA raw parser cannot, including aliased symbols such as USOIL -> USOUSD and CRT/ICT SL@ / TP-1@ styles. Bridge now sends cleaned EA-friendly raw text with the parsed symbol, entry, SL, TP, suffix, and ref. Routing suffix detection also explains multiple connected MT5 accounts and their per-account suffixes.
